overview.description: The abrdn Bloomberg All Commodity Longer Dated Strategy K-1 Free ETF (BCD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad market commodities. The fund is passively managed to track the performance of a  broad commodity market index. The fund targets futures contracts typically 27 months out to expiration BCD was launched on Mar 30, 2017 and is issued by aberdeen.
infoTable: Bloomberg Commodity Index 3 Month Forward Index
